findings.message: TASK-02 both blocks CHECKPOINT-A and is blocked by it — circular dependency. Task graph is invalid for auto-build.
resolveActorClaims has no thread context; review-thread-send compat/no-compat decision for DM vs broadcast cannot be made at claim-resolution time.
TASK-05 missing inbox-draft.route.test.ts:373 (old 3-arg savePrimeInboxDraft) and apps/prime/functions/__tests__/helpers.ts:9 (needs new secret field).
TASK-06 missing apps/reception/wrangler.toml — deployed worker sources secrets from wrangler.toml, not .env.example.
Engineering coverage overstates protection: 'all future D1 actorUid values cryptographically bound' is false during compat window (non-broadcast still accepts plain uid until TASK-07).
StaffOwnerGateEnv extension reference in Engineering Coverage row is stale — interface unchanged.
isWholeHostelBroadcastThread is in prime-whole-hostel-campaigns.ts:64, not prime-review-send.ts.
